queries.question: Which librarians are located at University's main library and which archivists are located at the same place?
queries.sql:
SELECT Librarians.name
FROM Librarians
WHERE Librarians.location = "University's Main Library"
UNION
SELECT Archivists.name
FROM Archivists
WHERE Archivists.location = "University's Main Library"

queries.question: Provide a list of all librarians and also provide a list of archivists that are located at University's main library.
queries.sql:
SELECT Librarians.name
FROM Librarians
UNION
SELECT Archivists.name
FROM Archivists
WHERE Archivists.location = "University's Main Library"

ambiguous_dsl.question: List librarians and archivists that are located at University's main library.
